\tzpentry{ID4413}{Combo Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4413 introduces Combo Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Hhat_{\Omega} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m}\,\nabla_{T^2}^2 + V_{\pi}\bigl[k_{\mathrm{kiss}}\bigr] + \Hhat_{\mathrm{ent}}, \label{eq:HamiltonianOmega} \end{equation}
